scripts.site:assets: bun run site:llms && bun run scripts/site-assets.ts
scripts.site:css: bun run site:assets && tailwindcss -i docs/styles/site.css -o docs/static/site.css --minify
scripts.site:check: bun run site:css && zola --root docs check
scripts.site:build: bun run site:css && zola --root docs build
scripts.site:serve: bun run site:css && zola --root docs serve
scripts.site:deploy: bun run site:build && wrangler pages deploy docs/public --project-name=bop-docs --branch=main
